title: actaea mairei
intro: Actaea mairei, also known as the Maire's Actaea or Yatsuhashi, is a plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and it has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis, menstrual cramps, and fever. Herbal preparations of Actaea mairei are typically made from the root and rhizome, which are dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
